def negative_python_perf_layer_caching_cache_miss_duplicate_concurrent_work():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_caching_cache_miss_duplicate_concurrent_work"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Caching. Flag async or threaded cache miss paths that recompute the same key concurrently."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
